title: orobanche minor var. leucanthemi
intro: Orobanche minor var. leucanthemi, also known as the White-Flowered Broomrape, is a type of parasitic flowering plant that belongs to the broomrape family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Orobanche minor var. leucanthemi include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
